name: Aged mouse acute inflammation resolution and nano-proresolving medicine study
summary: Aged mice were compared with young mice in self-resolving peritonitis, lipid-mediator profiling, and treatment experiments using DHA or nano-proresolving medicines carrying aspirin-triggered resolvins.
model_system: Aged and young mice in zymosan-induced self-resolving peritonitis, with human monocyte reprogramming assays as mechanistic context
